summary: Comprehensive testing of Budget Mantra app completed. All core features working: Landing page with new Digital Clay theme, Signup/Login flows, Dashboard with Financial Health Score, Navigation with Chanakya link, and Chanakya AI chatbot with real Claude integration via Emergent LLM Key.
passed_tests: Landing page displays correctly with orange theme and all sections (hero, features, how-it-works, benefits, CTA, footer)
Login flow works with test credentials and redirects to dashboard
Signup flow creates new account and redirects to dashboard with success toast
Dashboard displays stats cards (Total Income, Total Expenses, EMI Payments, Remaining)
Financial Health Score component displays with score, status, and recommendations
Navigation shows all menu items including 'Chanakya'
Chanakya chatbot page loads with welcome message
Chatbot accepts user input and shows loading state
Chatbot receives AI response from Claude via Emergent LLM Key
All 18 backend API tests passed (auth, categories, EMIs, transactions, financial score, when-to-buy, SMS parsing, family groups)
seed_data_creation: Created test categories and EMIs during backend testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_api.py cover auth, budget categories, EMIs, transactions, financial score, when-to-buy, chatbot, SMS parsing, and family groups. Chatbot uses real Claude integration via Emergent LLM Key (not mocked).

features_verified.landing_page: ✓ Orange theme, hero section, features, how-it-works, benefits, CTA, footer
features_verified.dashboard: ✓ Stats cards, Financial Health Score, Active EMIs, Prepayment Tips, Chanakya card
features_verified.navigation: ✓ All menu items visible including Chanakya
features_verified.chatbot: ✓ Welcome message, suggested questions, user input, loading state, AI response
